Roofing Calculator (Squares)

Calculate how many roofing squares your project needs. One roofing square = 100 square feet. Enter your roof dimensions.

FAQ

What is a roofing square?

A roofing square is a unit of measurement equal to 100 square feet (10×10 area). It's the standard unit for ordering roofing materials.

How do I account for roof pitch?

Multiply the flat area by the pitch factor: 4/12=1.054, 6/12=1.118, 8/12=1.202, 10/12=1.302, 12/12=1.414.

How many shingles per square?

Standard 3-tab shingles: 3 bundles per square. Architectural shingles: 3-5 bundles per square depending on brand.
